rules.short_name: Speak freely from any side but follow Reddit's Content Policy.
rules.violation_reason: Speak freely from any side but follow Reddit's Content Policy.

rules.short_name: No brigading from any side. Censor names of private individuals and other Subreddits before posting.
rules.violation_reason: No brigading from any side. Censor names of private individuals and other Subreddits before posting.

rules.description: As long as the post is about AI, political discussion around that post is allowed in the comments. Reddit and Sub content policy still needs to be followed.
rules.short_name: No politics or religion unless explicitly connected to AI.
rules.violation_reason: No politics or religion unless explicitly connected to AI
rules.description_html:
<!-- SC_OFF --><div class="md"><p>As long as the post is about AI, political discussion around that post is allowed in the comments. Reddit and Sub content policy still needs to be followed.</p>
</div><!-- SC_ON -->

rules.short_name: Censor usernames and personal information of ALL private figures. Public figures are exempt.
rules.violation_reason: Censor usernames and personal information of ALL private figures. Public figures are exempt.

rules.description: In order to cut down on spam and harassment, we have a new AutoMod rule that an account must be at least 7 days old to post or comment here.
rules.short_name: Account must be at least 7 days old to post and comment here.
rules.violation_reason: Account must be at least 7 days old to post and comment here.
rules.description_html:
<!-- SC_OFF --><div class="md"><p>In order to cut down on spam and harassment, we have a new AutoMod rule that an account must be at least 7 days old to post or comment here.</p>
</div><!-- SC_ON -->

rules.description: In order to cut down on potential brigading, cross posts will be removed. Please repost by taking a screenshot of the post and censoring the sub name as well as the username and private info of any users.
rules.short_name: No crossposting. Take a screenshot, censor sub and user info and post.
rules.violation_reason: No crossposting. Take a screenshot, censor sub and user info and post.
rules.description_html:
<!-- SC_OFF --><div class="md"><p>In order to cut down on potential brigading, cross posts will be removed. Please repost by taking a screenshot of the post and censoring the sub name as well as the username and private info of any users.</p>
</div><!-- SC_ON -->

rules.description: To differentiate this space from art subreddits, posts featuring nothing but traditional art or AI art without contributing to broader discussion may be removed.
rules.short_name: This is not a sub for posting art.
rules.violation_reason: This is not a sub for posting art.
rules.description_html:
<!-- SC_OFF --><div class="md"><p>To differentiate this space from art subreddits, posts featuring nothing but traditional art or AI art without contributing to broader discussion may be removed.</p>
</div><!-- SC_ON -->

rules.short_name: Debate at will. The floor is open.
rules.violation_reason: Debate at will. The floor is open.
